title: Darryl Peek on working for the public sector at Elastic
contentSnippet: Darryl’s family has a long history of military service and Darryl himself has always supported the public sector — his career has taken him to various private and public enterprises within a public sector team.

title: Khalil Corbin on how the arts helped shape him — and led to his communications career
contentSnippet: Before joining Elastic, Khalil Corbin worked in the public sector, doing non-profit work with kids on probation — and writing for music blogs on the side. At Elastic, he found an opportunity to write  — and grow his career.

title: Zcashd 5.6.0 released, SDKs and lightwalletd next
contentSnippet: Electric Coin Co. released zcashd 5.6.0 today, a key piece to solving wallet performance issues and one of the last remaining hurdles to exiting emergency mode. The SDK and lightwalletd will be released next week.

title: Zcash Foundation releases first stable, audited version of Zebra
contentSnippet: Zebra is an alternative Zcash node implementation that has been written in entirely in RUST. It can be used to join the Zcash peer-to-peer network, validate and broadcast transactions, and maintain the Zcash blockchain state in a distributed manner.

title: Shielded Labs receives funding to bootstrap Zcash work
contentSnippet: An independent, Swiss-based organization called Shielded Labs announced it received a generous private donation to bootstrap operations. Its mission is to increase user adoption, develop new use cases for Zcash, and contribute to protocol development.

title: Zooko featured in ‘A brief history of zero-knowledge proofs’
contentSnippet: The past, present, and future of zero-knowledge proofs. Featuring Electric Coin Co. CEO Zooko Wilcox.

title: Speeding up FROST with multi-scalar multiplication
contentSnippet: Zcash Foundation optimizes implementation of FROST by upwards of 50% over the trivial implementation, without changing the protocol and therefore maintaining its existing security guarantees.

title: ECC restructuring to better serve Zcash
contentSnippet: Electric Coin Co. announced a restructuring of the company to focus its time and expertise on specific parts of the Zcash mission and help transition some activities to other organizations in the Zcash community.

title: Ledger joins PGP for Crypto podcast
contentSnippet: Ledger's Seth Hertlein, Global Head of Policy, and Ian Rogers, Chief Experience Officer, sit down with ECC's Gary Weinstein to discuss blockchain policy, crypto regulation, and global public policy strategy. Special emphasis on key regulatory challenges in the US and EU.

title: ECC’s Brigner joins Federalist Society panel on CBDCs
contentSnippet: This webinar features a discussion with US Rep. Tom Emmer, Prof. J.W. Verret of the Antonin Scalia Law School, and an expert panel discussing a Federal Reserve CBDC the recent sanctioning of Tornado Cash and more.

title: Student Loan Breach Exposes 2.5M Records
contentSnippet: 2.5 million people were affected, in a breach that could spell more trouble down the line.

title: Watering Hole Attacks Push ScanBox Keylogger
contentSnippet: Researchers uncover a watering hole attack likely carried out by APT TA423, which attempts to plant the ScanBox JavaScript-based reconnaissance tool.

title: Tentacles of ‘0ktapus’ Threat Group Victimize 130 Firms
contentSnippet: Over 130 companies tangled in sprawling phishing campaign that spoofed a multi-factor authentication system.

title: Ransomware Attacks are on the Rise
contentSnippet: Lockbit is by far this summer’s most prolific ransomware group, trailed by two offshoots of the Conti group.

title: Cybercriminals Are Selling Access to Chinese Surveillance Cameras
contentSnippet: Tens of thousands of cameras have failed to patch a critical, 11-month-old CVE, leaving thousands of organizations exposed.

title: Twitter Whistleblower Complaint: The TL;DR Version
contentSnippet: Twitter is blasted for security and privacy lapses by the company’s former head of security who alleges the social media giant’s actions amount to a national security risk.

title: Firewall Bug Under Active Attack Triggers CISA Warning
contentSnippet: CISA is warning that Palo Alto Networks’ PAN-OS is under active attack and needs to be patched ASAP.

title: Fake Reservation Links Prey on Weary Travelers
contentSnippet: Fake travel reservations are exacting more pain from the travel weary, already dealing with the misery of canceled flights and overbooked hotels.
